name: Joseph Jones
role: Family Get Together · Sept 9, 2026 · 15 guests · Providence RI

handling.tone: Side-of-pipeline lead, casual home gathering. Don't over-pitch. Speed of response wins small jobs. Apr 24 follow-up sent in Portuguese — likely off for an Anglo name.
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: brief, no churrasco-pitch first, drop-off menu and price. Casual home gathering ≠ wedding vibe.
handling.context: Inbound Apr 22 from FB Lead Form. 15 guests, family get together, 09/09 (year ambiguous). $450 ballpark = drop-off pricing. No response. Common name profile — minimal public footprint.

context_anchors: Providence RI, 02909 — urban Providence, mixed demos

lead.source: FB Lead Form — VIDEO RODS WEDDING & FACELESS
lead.next_move: One quick-quote message: drop-off vs light buffet + cuisine direction; quote 24h

enrichment.identity_notes: Extremely common name (top 100 most common in US). Public web research effectively useless. Providence zip + family-gathering = household head planning casual home event.
win_angles: Right-size the offer — drop-off menu, price for 15, 2-3 entrée options
Speed wins small jobs — quote fast and clean
Don't pitch Brazilian BBQ first — open cuisine door
Future referral source if it goes well
nepq_openers: Continuation: 'Hey Joseph — quick check-in. Family get-together 9/9 with 15 people: drop-off (we deliver, you serve), light buffet (drop, set, leave), or full hosted? And cuisine — Brazilian BBQ vibe, classic American comfort, or something else?'
Frame: 'What's the part of organizing this you're most trying to skip — cooking, cleanup, both?'
Anchor: 'For 15 people, drop-off typically $20-35/pp = $300-525 ballpark. Want me to put a quick menu in front of you?'
enrichment.strategic_note: Small-but-profitable side lead. $450 @ 20% = $90 EV — barely justifies time. BUT future referral if booked. One good message, one quick quote, close or move on. Don't overinvest. Won by speed and clarity, not elaborate proposals.

notes: Side-of-pipeline; speed wins or move on
Apr 24 Portuguese SMS likely a misfire on Anglo name
Future referral asset only if booked happily
